name: Grape Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, salt, baking powder, and spices.
2. Slowly add dry ingredients to the apple sauce mixture, grape juice, butter (if applicable), and eggs. Mix well between each ingredient. Blend on low speed for 1/2 minute using a mixer. Scrape the bowl constantly.
3. Stop the mixer and stir in chopped pecans, dates, and nuts.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured Bundt pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes. Place on a rack to cool.
6. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
